description: Starburst provides data access and analytics products built around distributed SQL querying, including the self-managed Starburst Enterprise platform and the managed Starburst Galaxy service. Its products let organizations query and manage data across multiple sources, with administration, data product, and workflow features.
summary: starburst.io exposes Starburst Enterprise and Starburst Galaxy developer surfaces including two HTTP APIs, two Java-based CLIs, and a documented Galaxy MCP server; published docs clearly confirm token/basic auth for the HTTP APIs, while CLI and MCP connection/auth mechanics are only partially documented in the pages reviewed.
